creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I don't really see the need of .packlist generation, I tend to remove them
from the plist files with staging.
I think their content is of no use to use, I don't like the idea of having
plist automatically generated because we would not know which directory to
@dirrm and which to @dirrmtry, so we'd end up with @dirrmtry'ing
everything, which I don't feel is good.

-- 
Mathieu Arnold
